description_long: This object consists of five individual gloves, each designed for hand protection and utility in urban environments. The gloves are primarily dark in color, with one glove in the center featuring a brown hue, while the others are shades of black or dark gray. The gloves have reinforced knuckle and palm areas, suggesting durability and enhanced grip, and one glove displays a visible brand marking on the wrist area. The surface appears to be made of synthetic leather or similar material, with some textural variation for grip and comfort. The gloves are likely intended for activities such as cycling, construction, or general outdoor use, and their design suggests a snug, ergonomic fit.
description: A set of five durable, dark-colored gloves with reinforced palms and knuckles, including one brown glove among black and gray ones. One glove features a visible brand marking, and all appear suited for urban utility or protective use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the palm side of all five gloves, highlighting reinforced areas and a visible brand marking on the leftmost glove.
description_view_1: Side view showing the gloves stacked edge-on, revealing the thickness and finger contours but minimal surface detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the gloves, with knuckle reinforcements and the brown glove in the center standing out.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the gloves edge-on with finger outlines and no visible markings.
attribute_logo: White 'REV'IT!' text on the wrist of the leftmost glove
